description:
Correct Missing Translations on PL About Page

The Polish language version of the About page (/pl/about) contains multiple untranslated elements that are still displaying in the default language instead of Polish.

Requirements:
- Audit the /pl/about page to identify all untranslated text elements
- Locate the corresponding translation keys in the Polish language files
- Add missing Polish translations for all identified elements
- Verify translations include: headings, body text, button labels, navigation items, meta tags, and any dynamic content
- Ensure translations are contextually appropriate and grammatically correct
- Test the page after updates to confirm all elements render in Polish
- Check for any hardcoded strings that need to be moved to translation files

Edge cases to consider:
- Pluralization rules specific to Polish language
- Date/time formatting according to Polish conventions
- Character encoding for Polish special characters (ą, ć, ę, ł, ń, ó, ś, ź, ż)
- Fallback behavior if translations are missing
